action.reasoning: Observation: best hidden EER remains 0.2538 from checkpoints/best_codec.pt; XLS-R, continued WavLM fine-tuning, and clean+codec ensembling all worsened. Analysis: remaining upside likely requires a targeted training/inference variant, but the current workspace content is truncated and only patch_predict.py is visible, so I must inspect existing train/model/predict code before editing. Decision: run a compact inspection focused on model pooling, train augmentation, CLI options, and predict inference so the next iteration can safely implement a low-risk WavLM variant or TTA experiment.
action.command:
python - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
for fn in ['model.py','train.py','continue_train.py','predict.py']:
    p=Path(fn)
    print(f'===== {fn} exists={p.exists()} size={p.stat().st_size if p.exists() else 0} =====')
    if not p.exists():
        continue
    s=p.read_text().splitlines()
    keys=['class ','def ','argparse','add_argument','codec','augment','forward','collate','DataLoader','WeightedRandomSampler','BCE','pos_weight','pool','mean','max','hidden_states','AutoModel','from_pretrained','autocast','batch_size']
    for i,line in enumerate(s,1):
        if any(k in line for k in keys):
            lo=max(1,i-2); hi=min(len(s),i+3)
            print(f'-- lines {lo}-{hi}')
            for j in range(lo,hi+1):
                print(f'{j:04d}: {s[j-1]}')
    print()
PY
